title: 10 best herbal capsules for dry mouth

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain salivary enzymes that stimulate saliva production, replenishing the natural balance of moisture in the mouth. The herb's active compounds, such as rosmarinic acid and carnacic acid, have been shown to increase the production of saliva, which can help alleviate symptoms of dry mouth, including discomfort, sticky or tacky feelings, and difficulty chewing or swallowing.
remedy_properties: Antioxidants: Sage contains antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to dry mouth by protecting the mucous membranes from damage.
Mucilages: The mucilage in sage helps to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the mouth, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with dry mouth.
Salivary stimulating compounds: Sage contains compounds that stimulate saliva production, which can help alleviate symptoms of dry mouth such as xerostomia (dryness of the mouth).
remedy_parts: Roots: Containing a high concentration of rosmarinic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help alleviate symptoms of dry mouth.
Barks: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help soothe and protect mucous membranes, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with dry mouth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality salvia officinalis leaves from a trusted source measuring exactly 30 grams for this batch.
Clean and dry the harvested leaves thoroughly within 24 hours of harvest using a soft-bristled brush.
Cut the dried leaves into small pieces and grind them into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 500 milliliters of high-quality vodka with 250 grams of the powdered sage in a glass container allowing it to steep at room temperature for 2 weeks.
Strain the liquid through a coffee filter into another clean glass container discarding the solids then fill capsules with 200 milligrams each containing 20% sage extract using a capsule machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain rosmarinic acid, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation in the salivary glands. This anti-inflammatory property helps to increase saliva production, which can alleviate symptoms of dry mouth such as sticky or dry feeling in the mouth and difficulty chewing and swallowing. Additionally, lemon balm's calming effects on the nervous system may also help to relax the muscles involved in speaking and eating, further reducing discomfort associated with dry mouth.
remedy_properties: Antimuscarinic effect: Lemon balm contains compounds that block the action of muscarinic receptors, which can help reduce saliva production and alleviate dry mouth symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The flavonoids and terpenes present in lemon balm have anti-inflammatory effects, which may help soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the mouth and throat, reducing discomfort caused by dry mouth.

Gastroprotective effects: Lemon balm has been shown to protect the stomach lining from damage, which can be beneficial for individuals with dry mouth who may experience stomach upset or inflammation due to reduced saliva production.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that help reduce inflammation and soothe mouth tissues, making them ideal for alleviating dry mouth symptoms.
Seeds: Contain essential oils with antibacterial properties that help combat oral bacteria responsible for bad breath and gum inflammation associated with dry mouth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh lemon balm leaves in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the leaves by spreading them thinly on paper bags or trays for 1-2 weeks.
Crush the dried lemon balm leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 250-500 milligrams of crushed lemon balm with 50-100 milliliters of cornstarch or cellulose to fill empty gelatin capsules.
Seal the filled capsules by hand or using a capsule filling machine and store them in an airtight container for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain the herb Glycyrrhiza glabra, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the mouth. This can help to reduce inflammation and irritation caused by a dry mouth, allowing for a healthier and more comfortable oral environment. Additionally, licorice root has been shown to have antibacterial properties, which can help to combat gum disease and bad breath associated with dry mouth.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that can help reduce inflammation in the mouth and throat, which can contribute to dry mouth symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Licorice roots have been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat dry mouth due to their anti-inflammatory and soothing properties.
Barks: The barks of the licorice plant contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to reduce inflammation and irritation in the mouth, making it effective in treating dry mouth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh glycyrrhiza glabra roots and clean them thoroughly of dirt and debris.
Dry the cleaned roots in a warm dark place for 3-4 days or use a dehydrator at low heat.
Crush the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix one part powdered root with two parts gelatin and fill into empty capsules using a capsule filler machine.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sweet cicely capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain Myrrhis odorata, a plant-based extract that has been traditionally used to soothe oral mucous membranes. The antioxidants and flavonoids present in sweet cicely help to reduce inflammation and irritation in the mouth, alleviating symptoms of dry mouth such as burning sensations, sticky saliva, and difficulty eating or speaking. By promoting healthy oral tissues, sweet cicely capsules can bring relief to individuals suffering from this common condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Sweet Cicely's anti-inflammatory compounds can reduce inflammation in the oral cavity, which can help alleviate dry mouth symptoms by soothing irritated tissues and reducing pain.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant properties of Sweet Cicely capsules can help protect the oral mucosa from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dry mouth.

Mucilage-rich properties: Sweet Cicely contains a high concentration of mucilage, a thick, protective substance that can help soothe and lubricate the mucous membranes in the mouth, providing relief from dryness and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilages, which help to soothe and lubricate the oral cavity, providing relief from dry mouth symptoms.
Seeds: Containing essential oils with anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce inflammation in the mouth and throat, contributing to a sense of relief from dryness.
remedy_recipe: Measure and sift 50 grams of dried myrrhis odorata herb into a clean glass bowl.
Combine the herb with 500 milliliters of boiling water in a stainless steel pot.
Simmer the mixture for 30 minutes, then strain and discard the solids.
Mix 250 milliliters of the resulting liquid extract with 50 grams of gelatin capsules and 10 milliliters of glycerin.
Fill clean gelatin capsules with the prepared herbal mixture, sealing each capsule individually.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain natural compounds that stimulate saliva production. The bioactive compounds in elderberry, such as anthocyanins and flavonoids, have been shown to increase salivation and improve oral hydration. By promoting a healthy balance of saliva levels, elder capsules can help alleviate symptoms of xerostomia (dry mouth), reducing the risk of tooth decay, gum disease, and other oral health issues associated with dry mouth. Additionally, elderberry's anti-inflammatory properties may also soothe and calm irritated oral tissues.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Elderberry's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the salivary glands, which can contribute to dry mouth symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in elderberry capsules may help reduce inflammation in the mouth and throat tissues, which can alleviate dryness and discomfort associated with xerostomia (dry mouth).

Mucolytic properties: Elderberry's mucolytic properties can help break down mucus and promote its removal from the oral cavity, reducing the feeling of sticky, dry sensation often experienced with dry mouth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which help to stimulate saliva production and reduce inflammation in the mouth.
Barks: Contain flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory properties, helping to soothe dry mouth symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest sambucus nigra flowers and leaves in the summer months when they are in full bloom.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator or air circulation for 24 hours.
Grind 10 grams of dried sambucus nigra flowers and leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered herb with 100ml of glycerin in a clean glass jar for 2 weeks, allowing it to steep.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter and fill empty capsules with the resulting herbal extract.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain mucilages, which are natural soothing agents that help to lubricate and protect the mucous membranes in the mouth. When taken as a supplement, these mucilages can help to reduce inflammation and irritation in the mouth, providing relief from dryness and discomfort. Additionally, marshmallow capsules may also help to stimulate saliva production, further aiding in the restoration of natural moisture levels in the mouth.
remedy_properties: Mucilage: The primary medicinal property of marshmallow capsules, mucilage is a thick, protective gel-like substance that coats the mouth and throat tissues, providing relief from dryness, irritation, and inflammation by locking in moisture and shielding against further damage.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Marshmallow capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with dry mouth conditions such as stomatitis or oral thrush, promoting a healthy environment for healing and reducing pain and discomfort.

Sothating and soothing action: The mucilage and other bioactive compounds in marshmallow capsules have a calming effect on the mucous membranes of the mouth and throat, providing quick relief from dryness, burning, and itching sensations, making it an effective remedy for dry mouth conditions.
remedy_parts: Roots: Marshmallow roots are used due to their mucilaginous properties, which help to soothe and protect the oral mucosa, alleviating dry mouth symptoms.
Buds: Marshmallow buds contain a high concentration of saponins, which have anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce inflammation associated with dry mouth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh althaea officinalis leaves and flowers or purchase dried herb from a reputable source in bulk quantities for processing.
Dry the harvested herbs using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 24 hours or by spreading them thinly on paper bags and leaving them in a warm dry place for several days.
Grind the dried herbal material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or an electric spice grinder to ensure even extraction.

Mix 1 part ground althaea officinalis with 2 parts gelatin in a small bowl, adding water as needed to form a smooth paste that can be filled into capsules, allowing the mixture to dry for at least 30 minutes before use.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the dried herb-gelatin mixture and seal them immediately, storing them in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months or until needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain the herb Calendula officinalis, which has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the mouth. The capsules' anti-inflammatory effects help to reduce inflammation and irritation caused by xerostomia (dry mouth), alleviating symptoms such as dryness, stickiness, and burning sensations. Additionally, pot marigold's antioxidant properties may also help to neutralize free radicals that can contribute to dry mouth.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Pot marigold capsules contain flavonoids and carotenoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the mouth and throat, alleviating symptoms of dry mouth.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidant properties of pot marigold capsules can help protect the mucous membranes in the mouth from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dry mouth.

Mucilages and emollients: Pot marigold contains a type of carbohydrate called mucilage, which can help soothe and moisturize the mucous membranes in the mouth, providing relief from dryness and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help to soothe and protect oral tissues, alleviating dry mouth symptoms.
Flowers: Packed with flavonoids and terpenes, flowers have natural astringent and anti-bacterial properties that can help combat inflammation and infection causing dry mouth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh calendula flowers in the morning after sunrise for maximum potency and quality.
Clean and dry the harvested flowers immediately by spreading them out on paper towels or clean cloth.
Use a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle to grind the dried flowers into a fine powder weighing approximately 200 grams.
Mix the powdered calendula with 400 milliliters of distilled water and let it steep for 30 minutes in a double boiler to create an infusion.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or coffee filter and fill empty gelatin capsules with the resulting herbal extract, storing them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain a soothing compound called linalool, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties. When ingested, this compound helps to reduce inflammation in the mouth and throat, alleviating symptoms of dry mouth. Additionally, the calming effects of English lavender also promote relaxation and reduced stress levels, both of which can contribute to increased saliva production and improved oral hydration. By addressing the underlying causes of dry mouth, these capsules provide natural relief for those suffering from this common condition.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lavender's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the mucous membranes, which can alleviate symptoms of dry mouth by promoting healthy tissue repair and regeneration.

Soothing and anti-inflammatory properties: Lavender's calming compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, have been shown to reduce inflammation and irritation in the mouth, providing relief from discomfort and pain associated with dry mouth.

Mucilages and demulcent properties: The capsules' mucilage content helps protect and soothe the mucous membranes, forming a physical barrier that shields them from irritants and promotes healing, which can help alleviate symptoms of dry mouth such as burning and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lavender roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm the mucous membranes in the mouth, providing relief from dryness.

Buds: The buds of the English lavender plant contain flavonoids that have antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against bacterial infections associated with dry mouth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of fresh or dried lavandula angustifolia flowers in the morning for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested lavender flowers at 60°c temperature and 10% humidity for 24 hours.
Grind 30 grams of dried lavender flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the powdered lavender with 100ml distilled water to create a decoction and simmer for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 200mg of the lavender decoction and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain menthol, a natural ingredient that stimulates saliva production. When taken orally, peppermint oil is absorbed into the bloodstream and travels to the salivary glands, increasing moisture levels in the mouth. This can help alleviate symptoms of dry mouth, such as sticky or rough feeling, bad breath, and difficulty speaking or eating. Additionally, peppermint's cooling sensation can provide temporary relief from discomfort associated with dry mouth.
remedy_properties: Menthol content: Menthol, a natural compound found in peppermint oil, helps to stimulate saliva production by activating the trigeminal nerve, which regulates salivation. This increases moisture levels in the mouth and alleviates dryness.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Peppermint's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce inflammation in the mouth and throat, which is often associated with dry mouth conditions like xerostomia. This reduction in inflammation can contribute to a sense of relief from dry mouth symptoms.

Antioxidant activity: Peppermint capsules' antioxidant compounds can help protect the mucous membranes in the mouth and throat from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dry mouth conditions.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the peppermint plant contain menthol, a natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory compound that helps to reduce pain and inflammation in the mouth, making it an effective ingredient in dry mouth capsules.

Barks: The barks of the peppermint plant are rich in flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the mouth, alleviating symptoms of dry mouth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh peppermint leaves in the morning when the essential oils are most potent, ensuring at least 30g of leaves.
Clean and sanitize the harvested leaves by rinsing them with filtered water and air-drying for at least 24 hours.
Chop the dried peppermint leaves into smaller pieces, blending them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill.
Mix the peppermint powder with 250g of gelatin capsules in a bowl, carefully filling each capsule to ensure even distribution.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months, allowing for gradual release of menthol and other beneficial compounds.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme capsules helps with dry mouth because they contain the natural antibacterial properties of thyme, which can help to reduce inflammation and soothe the mucous membranes in the mouth. The capsules' antioxidant-rich compounds also work to neutralize free radicals that can contribute to dryness and irritation. By promoting healthy oral flora and reducing inflammation, herbal thyme capsules can help to restore a healthy balance to the mouth, alleviating symptoms of dry mouth and promoting a sense of comfort and well-being.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial Properties: Thyme capsules have antimicrobial properties that help to reduce the growth of bacteria, fungi, and viruses in the mouth, which can contribute to dry mouth symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory Effects: The anti-inflammatory compounds in thyme capsules help to soothe and calm irritated mucous membranes in the mouth, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with dry mouth.
Salivary Stimulant Properties: Thyme contains compounds that stimulate salivation, increasing saliva production and helping to alleviate dryness and stickiness in the mouth.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of thyme contain a high concentration of antioxidants and flavonoids, which can help to soothe and moisturize the oral cavity, alleviating symptoms of dry mouth.
Rhyzomes: Thyme rhizomes have been traditionally used in herbal remedies to treat various oral health issues, including dry mouth, due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried thymus vulgaris leaves from a reputable source in amounts of 2 ounces for every 100 capsules you plan to fill.
Grind the dried thymus vulgaris leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle within 24 hours of harvesting.
Mix the ground thyme with silica filler to create a consistent blend and achieve the desired capsule size.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the thyme blend at a dose of 400 milligrams per capsule and seal each capsule immediately after filling.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to two years or until they are consumed.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for dry mouth are natural supplements designed to alleviate the symptoms of xerostomia, or dry mouth. They work by stimulating saliva production and soothing oral tissues, reducing discomfort, and preventing dental problems. Examples of herbal capsules that help with dry mouth include those containing sage, peppermint, and licorice root, which have been shown to effectively reduce symptoms. For individuals suffering from dry mouth, these capsules can improve their ability to speak, eat, and sleep comfortably, leading to a significant improvement in their overall quality of life.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat dry mouth with herbal capsules is to look for products containing herbs like peppermint, sage, and slippery elm. These natural remedies have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the mouth and throat. Additionally, taking probiotics in capsule form can also aid in restoring the balance of good bacteria in the mouth, which can contribute to a healthier oral environment.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to dry mouth that are treated with herbal capsules are gastrointestinal issues such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), inflammatory bowel disease, and acid reflux. Herbal supplements like slippery elm, marshmallow root, and licorice root help soothe digestive tract inflammation, reduce irritation, and promote healthy mucous production. These natural remedies can also address respiratory concerns like bronchitis, asthma, and chronic coughs by loosening mucus and reducing inflammation in the airways.
